goal: Strengthen proofs for utilities with weak/no proofs

groups.title: System Info — /proc readers
groups.note: All read /proc files and format output. Proofs: valid output formats, /proc parsing correctness, edge cases (missing fields).

groups.title: User/Environment — FFI + string matching
groups.note: All use FFI (environ, getpwuid, getgrgid, getutxent) or match KEY=VALUE strings. Proofs: string matching, parsing line formats, empty/edge cases.

groups.title: Path Operations — string parsing
groups.note: All parse path strings. Proofs: path component extraction, edge cases (root, empty, relative).

groups.title: Text Transform — pure string/char processing
groups.note: All transform text character-by-character. Proofs: length preservation, roundtrip (expand/unexpand inverse), char mapping, edge cases.

groups.title: Comparison/Merge — list operations
groups.note: All compare or merge sorted lists. Proofs: ordering invariants, field extraction, line counting.

groups.title: Boolean — trivial
groups.note: True returns true, False returns false. Minimal proofs needed — just add roundtrip examples.

groups.title: Random/Time — IO-bound
groups.note: Shuf uses IO.rand (hard to prove deterministically). Uptime parses /proc/uptime (Float-based). Add what we can.
